authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40(b)(32) — Cosumnes River (Sacramento Co.) from Highway 99 bridge to Latrobe vehicle bridge
sources.quotedText: (32) Cosumnes River (Sacramento Co.) from Highway 99 bridge upstream to the Latrobe vehicle bridge. Jan. 1 through Oct. 15. Only barbless hooks may be used. 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead in possession.

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (updated June 1, 2026)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 254780, "Cosumnes River", Stream, Sacramento/Amador/El Dorado Cos., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":254780,"gaz_name":"Cosumnes River","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Sacramento"} (also listed under Amador and El Dorado Cos. with identical geometry) — geometry multipoint; first point (Web Mercator -13518542.2724, 4615579.0419) converts to lon -121.439130, lat 38.255480, at the river's mouth (confluence with the Mokelumne River near Thornton/Bruceville). The file's previous coordinate (-121.2200, 38.4100) was ~25.7 km away and unsupported by any GNIS-backed source; corrected to lon -121.4391, lat 38.2555, gnisId 254780.

parameters.note: Only barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Only barbless hooks may be used
regulations.verbatimText: Only barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: Limit applies to hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead combined (denoted ** in the CDFW table, indicating hatchery-origin fish).

regulations.humanSummary: Daily bag limit 2, possession limit 4, hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead combined
regulations.verbatimText: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
